manual_review_reason: Completes the finance cluster behind already-frozen BBCA/BBRI/BMRI and is the cleanest first finance add for manual confirmation.
Adds the first infrastructure slot, which helps satisfy the minimum sector-group breadth instead of over-concentrating only in existing frozen sectors.
Adds the first materials slot and improves sector diversification needed for a defensible expanded universe.
Adds the first healthcare slot and gives the hard-floor set a new non-cyclical sector group.
Strengthens industrial breadth next to frozen ASII without relying on another finance or consumer duplicate first.
Adds a second energy name behind frozen ADRO so the energy sleeve is not a single-name dependency.
Adds a second telco name behind frozen TLKM so the telco sleeve is not single-name only.
Broadens the consumer sleeve beyond the already-frozen INDF/ICBP/UNVR cluster.
Adds a second materials name to reduce dependence on a single candidate in that new sector group.
Adds a second infrastructure name so the new sector group is not represented by only one ticker.
Further improves telco breadth and reduces dependence on only TLKM plus one pending telco.
Adds industrial-distribution exposure and prevents the expanded universe from leaning too heavily on a single industrial profile.
Adds another consumer/agri profile and improves internal diversity inside the consumer sleeve.
Adds a third energy candidate so the hard-floor set does not rely on only ADRO/PTBA in one cyclical sleeve.
Adds another materials profile and keeps the hard-floor path diversified across more than six sector groups.
Backup finance add after BBNI; useful, but finance is already heavily represented by frozen anchors.
Backup materials add after ANTM/SMGR/TPIA; useful if a materials candidate is rejected.
Backup energy add after PTBA/ITMG; useful if one energy candidate is rejected.
Backup consumer add after MYOR/CPIN; useful if a consumer candidate is rejected.
Backup materials add after SMGR/TPIA; useful when more than the hard floor is desired.
Backup discretionary-consumer add after the safer hard-floor set is completed.
